llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Technician, Production
job.description: About BASF At BASF, we create chemistry for a sustainable future. We combine economic success with environmental protection and social responsibility. Around 112,000 employees in the BASF Group contribute to the success of our customers in nearly all sectors and almost every country in the world. Our portfolio comprises six segments: Chemicals, Materials, Industrial Solutions, Surface Technologies, Nutrition Care and Agricultural Solutions. BASF generated sales of €65.3 billion in 2024. BASF shares are traded on the stock exchange in Frankfurt (BAS) and as American Depositary Receipts (BASFY) in the United States. Further information at www.basf.com . Objectives of the Position According to the defined production processes and quality requirements, you are required to schedule and plan in line with Company EHS guideline, properly operate the machines/equipment, and handle the chemical raw materials to fabricate the products that meet the requirements in quantity, quality, schedule, and process. How You Will Do It Main Tasks • Perform on-site control and manual operation in the area of responsibility • Maintain a clean environment in the area of responsibility • All activities at work have to comply with the company's administration, safety, environmental protection and health regulations • Comply and perform all operations in accordance with the statement of work for all production activities to ensure that the product quality meets the cGMP standard • Undergo the assignment given by the operator in the control room and complete it • Attend training(s) • Handling and reporting of abnormal conditions On duty • Handover: Include the current operation status, abnormal progress, maintenance status and unfinished work in the area of responsibility • Perform environmental and equipment clean-up work in the area of responsibility • Daily maintenance of equipment, automatic inspection (SAMACO) and fire safety equipment inspection • Cooperate with the operator in the control room about sampling and all manual operations • Manage and organize the tools within the area of responsibility • Record the batch tables in production and perform on-site anomaly handling and reporting • Perform the tasks as assigned by the superior/supervisor Inter-relationship with the relevant unit • Take-out from the warehouse in conjunction with production • Send samples to the quality control laboratory for testing in conjuction with production • Support the inspection of equipment...
